case_title: LAMBRECHT COMPANY, LLC VS. STEFANIE HANEBUTT ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF OCT-17-2018 CONTINUED TO NOV-28-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
